ogTitle: Dingo vs Dingo Pocket: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dingo and Dingo Pocket.
heading: Dingo vs Dingo Pocket — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dingo, Queensland and Dingo Pocket, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dingo has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Dingo Pocket (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dingo or Dingo Pocket safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dingo has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Dingo Pocket scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dingo scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Dingo Pocket scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dingo or Dingo Pocket?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dingo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
